description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a long, rectangular footprint, surrounded by a well-maintained yard and landscaping. The main building features a gable roof with dark shingles and a prominent front entrance facing the street, flanked by symmetrical windows. A detached garage or outbuilding sits to one side, connected by a driveway that curves around the property. The grounds include a swimming pool, several trees, and decorative shrubbery, creating a suburban residential feel. The windows are arranged in a regular, symmetrical pattern along the front and sides, and the exterior walls appear to be finished in light-colored siding or brick. The property is bordered by a low fence or hedge, and the overall layout is spacious and open.
description: A single-story, gable-roofed bungalow with symmetrical windows, a detached garage, landscaped yard, and a swimming pool. The property is spacious, with trees, shrubs, and a curved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, driveway, detached garage, and landscaped yard with pool and trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable end of the bungalow, the detached garage, and the arrangement of trees and shrubs along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, the pool area, and the full length of the building with additional landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, rear yard, and the overall rectangular layout of the property with visible driveway and trees.
